prerequisite_groups.note: Only required if the live certification run is configured to use an external OPA service.

blocking_conditions: No tenant is currently selected for live certification.
No live Graph or Azure application credential set is available in the execution environment.
Mutation and audit toggles are disabled, so controlled write-path certification cannot begin.
Approval-path storage inputs are absent, so approval workflow checks cannot run.
Instruction API operator inputs are absent, so CAIO-surface checks cannot run.
next_actions: Set UCP_TENANT to a real non-production tenant with a valid tenant YAML configuration.
Load one supported Graph or Azure app credential set for that tenant, preferring certificate auth.
Enable ALLOW_M365_MUTATIONS and ENABLE_AUDIT_LOGGING for the approved certification window.
Provide approval storage configuration so approval-path checks can execute.
Provide CAIO_API_KEY and BASE_URL if the instruction API path is included in the certification run.
Re-run C1 once the prerequisite groups above are ready.
